features.name: dynamic shift left by zero
features.description: Code should include a dynamic shift left operation where the shift amount is computed to be zero via head extraction

features.name: dynamic shift with tail-reduced shift amount
features.description: Code should include a dynamic shift left where the shift amount is derived from a tail reduction of a signed value

features.name: pad before dynamic shift
features.description: Code should include a pad operation extending a value before using it in a dynamic shift chain
